specific_change.target: Implement predictive auto-scaling with scheduled capacity increases during 10–11 AM and 3–4 PM weekday windows. Maintain baseline of m5.large × 6 outside spike windows.
specific_change.produced: Replace the fixed 6× m5.large fleet with a scheduled auto-scaling group: maintain a baseline of 3× m5.large during off-peak hours (weekdays 20:00–09:00 UTC and weekends all day), scale to 6× m5.large
